The money you earn hosting will be sent to you 24 hours after your guest
arrives. You can check your upcoming payments in your Transaction History
<https://www.airbnb.com/users/transaction_history>.
Cancellations

Your cancellation policy for guests is Strict
<https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/149>.

The penalties for cancelling this reservation include getting a public
review that shows you cancelled, paying a cancellation fee and having the
cancelled nights blocked on your calendar.
Read cancellation penalties
<https://www.airbnb.co.uk/help/article/990?c=.pi80.pkYm9va2luZy9ob3N0L1Jlc2VydmF0aW9uSG9zdENvbmZpcm1hdGlvblRlbXBsYXRl&euid=d56cbcfb-2aca-ec12-f6f5-40c303d9c3a5>

Get ready for Roxana Edit’s arrival
Review the COVID-19 safety practices

We’ve created a set of mandatory COVID-19 safety practices for both Airbnb
hosts and guests. These include practising social distancing and wearing a
mask.
Review practices
<https://www.airbnb.co.uk/help/article/2839?c=.pi80.pkYm9va2luZy9ob3N0L1Jlc2VydmF0aW9uSG9zdENvbmZpcm1hdGlvblRlbXBsYXRl&euid=d56cbcfb-2aca-ec12-f6f5-40c303d9c3a5>

Follow the 5-step enhanced cleaning process

All hosts are required to follow the enhanced cleaning process between
guest stays. They were developed in partnership with experts in an effort
to curb the spread of COVID-19.
Review process
<https://www.airbnb.co.uk/help/article/2809?c=.pi80.pkYm9va2luZy9ob3N0L1Jlc2VydmF0aW9uSG9zdENvbmZpcm1hdGlvblRlbXBsYXRl&euid=d56cbcfb-2aca-ec12-f6f5-40c303d9c3a5>

Provide directions

Check that your guest knows how to get to your place.
Send message
<https://www.airbnb.co.uk/hosting/thread/2247447673?c=.pi80.pkYm9va2luZy9ob3N0L1Jlc2VydmF0aW9uSG9zdENvbmZpcm1hdGlvblRlbXBsYXRl&euid=d56cbcfb-2aca-ec12-f6f5-40c303d9c3a5&thread_type=home_booking>

Local Requirement

As you may know, Spain has rules which require hotels and other
accommodation providers to ensure that their guests’ information is
registered and shared with the law enforcement authorities. Please make
sure that you comply with your legal obligations and that, when your guests
check in, you ask all your guests over 16 years old to (i) show you their
ID Card/Passport and (ii) complete and sign an entry form for you to remit
it to the Police authorities within 24 hours.
[image: AirCover for Hosts]

Top-to-bottom protection, included every time you host.
Learn more
<https://www.airbnb.co.uk/help/article/3142/getting-protected-through-aircover-for-hosts?c=.pi80.pkYm9va2luZy9ob3N0L1Jlc2VydmF0aW9uSG9zdENvbmZpcm1hdGlvblRlbXBsYXRl&euid=d56cbcfb-2aca-ec12-f6f5-40c303d9c3a5&email_cta=>
